title: BerryGals World
description: A simple and lightweight modpack that includes many different mods that include structures, mobs, and blocks. Such as Macaws mods or even Vanilla+.
body:
# BerryGals World

The BerryGals World modpack is a modpack that allows the player to explore the open world and also be creative with the different block types this modpack includes from mods like Cottagecraft & Vanilla+

# Features

- CottageCraft Blocks
- BetterNether
- Dungeons and Taverns
- Essential Mod
- Macaw's Mods (Ex: Doors, Walls and Fences, Bridges)
- Mobs of Mythology

[BerryGals Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@BerryGal)

[BerryGals Discord Server](https://discord.gg/geKTrXeMAP)

NOTE: You may need to do java memory override in options since for some reason the memory I thought it was set it at would translate over to the actual file but it didnt
